name: Run Down (Salt Catfish and Tomatoes)
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Hot red pepper; chopped finely
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the lime juice over the fish and set aside.
2. Cook the coconut milk in a frying pan until it is oily.
3. Add onion and garlic to the pan and cook until the onion is tender.
4. Add hot red pepper, tomatoes, salt, pepper, thyme, and vinegar.
5. Stir gently and cook for 10 minutes.
6. Drain the fish, add it back into the pan, and cook until the fish is tender, about 10 minutes.
7. Serve hot with boiled bananas. Run down can also be used as a stuffing for breadfruit.
8. Salt codfish or rock lobster tails can be used instead of shad or mackerel.
